Package microui.component

Class CheckBox

java.lang.Object
microui.core.base.View
microui.core.base.SpatialView
microui.core.base.ContentView
microui.core.base.Component
microui.core.AbstractButton
microui.component.CheckBox
All Implemented Interfaces:
Visible
public class CheckBox extends AbstractButton
A CheckBox component that represents a binary state (checked or unchecked). The CheckBox extends AbstractButton to provide toggle functionality with three visual styles for the checked state: MARK, RECT, and DOT.
See Also:

  • Field Details

    • DEFAULT_SIZE

      public static final int DEFAULT_SIZE
      Default size of CheckBox
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

  • Constructor Details

    • CheckBox

      public CheckBox(float x, float y)
      Constructs a CheckBox at the specified position with default size. The checkbox is initialized with MARK style and the theme's primary color.
      Parameters:
      x - the x-coordinate of the checkbox's top-left corner
      y - the y-coordinate of the checkbox's top-left corner

    • CheckBox

      public CheckBox(boolean checked)
      Default constructor with default initialization
      Parameters:
      checked - the state for CheckBox

    • CheckBox

      public CheckBox()
      Default constructor with default initialization

  • Method Details

    • getCheckStyle

      public final CheckBox.CheckStyle getCheckStyle()
      Gets the visual style used to display the checked state.
      Returns:
      the current check style

    • setCheckStyle

      public final void setCheckStyle(CheckBox.CheckStyle checkStyle)
      Sets the visual style for displaying the checked state.
      Parameters:
      checkStyle - the check style to use (MARK, RECT, or DOT)
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if checkStyle is null

    • isChecked

      public final boolean isChecked()
      Gets the current checked state of the checkbox.
      Returns:
      true if the checkbox is checked, false otherwise

    • setChecked

      public final void setChecked(boolean checked)
      Sets the checked state of the checkbox. If the state changes, the onStateChangedListener will be notified.
      Parameters:
      checked - true to check the checkbox, false to uncheck it

    • toggle

      public final void toggle()
      Toggles the checked state of the checkbox. This method is automatically called when the checkbox is clicked.

    • getMarkColor

      public final AbstractColor getMarkColor()
      Gets the color used to draw the check mark or indicator.
      Returns:
      the current mark color

    • setMarkColor

      public final void setMarkColor(AbstractColor markColor)
      Sets the color used to draw the check mark or indicator.
      Parameters:
      markColor - the color to use for the check mark
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if markColor is null

    • setOnStateChangedListener

      public final void setOnStateChangedListener(Listener onStateChangedListener)
      Sets the listener to be called when the checkbox's state changes.
      Parameters:
      onStateChangedListener - the listener to call on state changes
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if the listener is null
